summary: BloodConnect full regression — 28/28 backend pytest passed (auth, donor register/me/update, complaints, admin block/unblock/complaints/csv/stats, blood requests, _id leak). UI flows verified: login → OTP → routing (unregistered→/home, registered 9123456789→/profile), Home hospital-city/phone + terms + complaint button, Complaint submission, Terms page renders full 10 sections, Donors bug FIX verified (462 donors shown for TN/A+), Admin PIN flow with 3 tabs, block/unblock/complaints all working, donor self-registration end-to-end.

react_native_issues.issue: Numerous 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' warnings on web preview. Cosmetic only — functionality not affected.
'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' warning. Cosmetic.

action_items: Optional: migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow and pointerEvents prop to style.pointerEvents to silence RN-web deprecation warnings.
Optional: replace browser alert() with in-app toast — during UI automation, alert dialogs block the flow (auto-accepted in tests). Not a bug, just UX polish for web.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is approaching 500 lines — consider splitting into routers/ (auth, donors, complaints, admin).
No duplicate registration check for incoming CSV uploads — bulk upload can create duplicate donor rows if same phone appears in multiple CSVs (by design for admin seed, but worth noting).
donor_available() silently swallows date parse errors; malformed last_donation_date in DB would treat donor as available.
DEV_MODE_OTP hardcoded default '123456' — acceptable per problem statement (Twilio will be integrated later).
seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral TEST_ donors via /donors/register (unique phone per run), a blocklist entry 9111111122 (unblocked at end), a blocklist entry 9555555555 from UI test (unblocked), and a few complaints ('TEST UI', 'TEST_C'). No production data modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_bloodconnect_api.py as pytest classes. Base URL is read from frontend/.env EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. testID naming: login-phone-input, send-otp-btn, otp-box-{0..5}, verify-otp-btn, open-register-link, open-admin-link, reg-name/phone/age/email/town, reg-bg-{A+/B+/...}, reg-state/city (SelectPicker modals), reg-submit-btn, hospital-city-input, hospital-phone-input, terms-checkbox, terms-link, submit-request-btn, register-complaint-btn, complaint-name/phone/details/submit-btn, admin-pin-input, admin-login-btn, admin-tab-{upload|block|complaints}, block-phone-input, block-reason-input, block-btn, blocked-{phone_key}, unblock-{phone_key}. Donors screen uses filter-state/filter-city/filter-bg pickers with local INDIA_STATES_CITIES (no /donors/filters dependency). OTP bypass code: 123456. Admin PIN: 0000.
rca_of_issue: Previous 'No donors found' bug fix confirmed: donors.tsx now uses local INDIA_STATES_CITIES for filter options (decoupled from server-derived /donors/filters), and defaults to state='Tamil Nadu' + blood_group from current_request. GET /api/donors?state=Tamil Nadu&blood_group=A+ returns 462 donors and the UI renders them correctly.
